name: Big Miller
abstract: Clarence Horatius "Big" Miller (December 18, 1922 – June 9, 1992) was an American jazz and blues singer and trombonist, chiefly associated with the Kansas City blues style.

concerts.label: Bel Canto Foundation Jazz Concert to Benefit Musicians
The Sensation of Music at Newport '61: Jon Hendricks' Evolution of the Blues
Midnight Performance: The Sensation of Music at Newport '61/ Jon Hendricks' Evolution of the Blues
